## Source: amazon-inspector (dcf692c43737b2f7360ab017ae983283e98b2d2591a90a3efff90685a95d2632)
The package dhgshop was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (194b5b6f2e47a1b70386a65d094c4b7d07a4fad392f36512b21542203c931dba)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'dhgshop' @ 9.0.10 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
